title: Platebook
description: A full-stack social platform for food lovers to share, save, and explore recipes. Features include recipe posting, liking, commenting, sharing, and an AI chatbot assistant.

title: Jogaliga
description: An all-in-one football app for organizing peladas, managing teams, booking courts, confirming attendance, and handling PIX payments easily in one place.

title: AURA
description: AURA is an ambient AI assistant that helps automate tasks, connect workflows, and provide smart support across apps through a simple and intelligent system.

title: Shortcut Showdown
description: Real-time typing battle game where players compete using keyboard shortcuts, combining speed, accuracy, and competitive learning in one interactive platform.

title: USTEPALCO
description: USTEPALCO is an electric billing system that helps USTP students easily view their electricity usage, manage billing details, and make payments without relying on paper bills or long lines.

title: Bamboost
description: E-commerce platform for bamboo products, helping customers browse, discover, and purchase sustainable bamboo-based items through a clean and user-friendly online store.

title: Checktrade Medrep Monitoring
description: USTEPALCO is an electric billing system that helps USTP students easily view their electricity usage, manage billing details, and make payments without relying on paper bills or long lines.
